weekly_lineup.weekly_revival: For one week only: a custom recipe or a riff on a classic. $12.

monday.title: Champagne & Charcuterie
monday.description: It's like lunchables but better (you also catch a buzz).

tuesday.title: Test Drink Tuesday
tuesday.description: Put down the vodka soda and step outside your comfort zone. Try out one of three weekly drinks invented by yours truly.

wednesday.title: Wanderlust Wednesday
wednesday.description: Grab a drink but leave your baggage at home. Every Wednesday, we pick a spot on the map and showcase three drinks that highlight the local cocktail culture.

thursday.title: Tiki Thursday
thursday.description: Because who doesn't love a tiny paper umbrella in their drink? Explore the varying tastes of tropical drinks.

bartenders_choice.description: Let us take a stab at your new favorite drink. All we need is a little guidance.

tiki_note: All Tiki drinks can be served sharable for $40. Best served for groups of 3. Limit one per group. Single serve Tiki mugs are available for purchase — $25.

metadata.note: Prices and availability may have changed since this menu was printed. Verify with Ryan before deploying to production.
